_provenance.sourceTitle: APPENDIX VI – NDCC Ballroom Syllabus Step List, Competitions & Medal Test
_provenance.sourceAuthor: George Pytlik / National Dance Council of Canada
_provenance.column: Foxtrot (column 3 of 4: Waltz · Tango · Foxtrot · Quickstep)
_provenance.method: Verbatim transcription from a 220-DPI rasterization of the page, Foxtrot column crop-and-enlarged for isolation (naive pdftotext cross-contaminates the 4-column layout). Names are exactly as printed; nothing expanded, corrected, or inferred.
_provenance.status: EXTRACTED — pending Victor's confirmation. Not yet audited.
_provenance.rules: Figure-name → tier/number is dance content. This file is the verbatim NDCC side only. Matching these names to ballroomguide figure names is a separate step done by Claude Code, with fuzzy/unmatched pairs flagged for Victor (never guessed).
notes: syllabusNumber is per-dance and cumulative across tiers — Foxtrot runs its own 1..25 sequence, NOT a global number shared with the other dances.

NO BEGINNERS FIGURES: the Foxtrot Beginners cell is blank in the source (Waltz, Tango, Quickstep all list Beginners figures; Foxtrot does not). Foxtrot's numbering therefore starts at 1 in Pre-Bronze. This confirms the Phase 2 Architecture Roadmap (Section A.2): 0 Beginners / 5 Pre-Bronze / 3 Bronze = 8 Bronze-cumulative.

'Feather Finish' is NOT a standalone numbered Foxtrot figure. It appears only embedded in #4 'Reverse Turn ( incl. Feather Finish )' and #5 'Closed Impetus and Feather Finish'. (Disambiguation flag from acquisition brief §9 / Step 3 work order §4.4 — surfaced to Victor, not resolved here.)

'Heel Pull' does NOT appear anywhere in the NDCC Foxtrot column. #3 is printed as plain 'Natural Turn' with no Heel Pull suffix or variant. (Disambiguation flag from acquisition brief §9 / Step 3 work order §4.4 — surfaced to Victor, not resolved here.)
Figure 4 'Reverse Turn ( incl. Feather Finish )' has spaces inside the parentheses as printed; transcribed verbatim.

Figures 5, 16, 25 wrap across two printed lines in the source ('Closed Impetus and Feather / Finish'; 'Open Telemark Outside Swivel / and Feather Ending'; 'Bounce Fallaway with Weave / Ending'); each is one figure.
Gold Star tier lists no individual figures: the source states 'Steps 1– 25 plus Gold Star groups / Fig. 1–25 plus groupes Etoile d'Or'. No Gold Star figure records are emitted.

Tier labels are bilingual in the source (e.g. 'Pre- Bronze - Pré- Bronze', 'Gold – Or'); syllabusLevel uses the English form (normalized to 'Pre-Bronze') to match existing data.js Waltz/Tango entries.

figures.flag: Parenthetical references Feather Finish, which is not a standalone numbered figure. Confirm intended matching to ballroomguide 'Reverse Turn' / 'Feather Ending'.
References Feather Finish (not a standalone numbered figure).

figures.ndccName: Open Telemark Outside Swivel and Feather Ending
